/usr/bin/clang++ -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Luau.Conformance.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Luau.Conformance.dir/tests/RegisterCallbacks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Luau.Conformance.dir/tests/Conformance.test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Luau.Conformance.dir/tests/IrLowering.test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Luau.Conformance.dir/tests/SharedCodeAllocator.test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Luau.Conformance.dir/tests/main.cpp.o -o Luau.Conformance  libLuau.Analysis.a libLuau.Compiler.a libLuau.CodeGen.a libLuau.VM.a libLuau.Config.a libLuau.Compiler.a libLuau.Ast.a libLuau.VM.a libLuau.Common.a
